Message

About

I am a results-driven Senior Technical Program Manager with over a decade of experience managing end-to-end program lifecycles, delivering innovative solutions in IoT, AI, and software engineering. My expertise lies in leading large-scale, cross-functional projects, with budgets exceeding millions of dollars, ensuring alignment with business objectives, and delivering measurable outcomes. As a certified Project Management Professional (PMP), I bring a structured approach to planning, execution, and stakeholder management while maintaining agility to adapt to dynamic business needs. Throughout my career, I have managed diverse teams and collaborated with global stakeholders, including enterprise clients, government agencies, and technical partners, to deliver high-impact solutions. I excel in translating complex business requirements into scalable, customer-centric products. By leveraging cloud-native architectures, IoT integrations, and AI/ML technologies, I have driven initiatives that optimize performance, enhance operational efficiency, and reduce costs. My leadership style focuses on fostering innovation and simplifying complex systems. I thrive in high-pressure environments, balancing short-term deliverables with long-term strategic goals. I take pride in building trust with stakeholders through transparent communication, proactive risk mitigation, and consistently delivering on commitments. Key Highlights: Successfully managed multi-million-dollar budgets for 20+ programs, ensuring on-time delivery and adherence to KPIs. Directed end-to-end program management for scalable IoT, AI, and digital twin solutions, achieving measurable impacts like 30% downtime reduction and 25% improvement in system responsiveness. PMP-certified, skilled in Agile and Waterfall methodologies, with expertise in cross-functional team collaboration, risk management, and KPI tracking. Adept at driving technical innovation, including the development of real-time dashboards, AI-driven platforms, and IoT integrations.

Top skills

Data Science • Machine Learning • Python (Programming Language) • Data Structures • C (Programming Language)

Experience

Technical Program Manager

US Ignite · Full-time

Jun 2018 - Present · 7 yrs 11 mos

Washington DC-Baltimore Area

• US Ignite is a White House Office of Science, Technology & Policy Initiative focused on Accelerating the Smart Cities Movement by enhancing Technological Innovations across the country. • Directed end-to-end delivery of multiple large-scale programs, including IoT-enabled smart infrastructure and AI-driven analytics, managing budgets exceeding $15M and ensuring on-time, high-quality delivery. • Led the development of scalable digital twins for critical transportation infrastructure. • Spearheaded the creation of the Ft. Carson Smart Base Dashboard, integrating IoT sensors and AI/ML models to optimize transportation and energy management, achieving significant efficiency improvement by having ROI greater than 18%. • Designed and implemented the 5G Living Lab at MCAS Miramar, integrating distributed energy resources (DERs) with 5G networks, improving system responsiveness by 25% and reducing the operator need to interface directly with systems. • Collaborated with cross-functional teams and partners, including Microsoft, Cisco, and Oracle, to deliver a cloud-native data marketplace framework for smart city operations. • Partnered with stakeholders across 15+ cities to customize and scale data solutions, driving over 25% improvement across business opportunities in decision-making efficiency through real-time dashboards. • Defined and executed technical roadmaps for software development projects, aligning solutions with organizational goals while balancing immediate needs and long-term scalability. • Optimized resource allocation by leveraging existing tools and infrastructure, resulting in significant cost savings without compromising quality. • Conducted technical deep dives to resolve system inefficiencies, enhance reliability, and ensure sustained performance across all deployed solutions. • Delivered key initiatives under tight deadlines, such as the Miami COVID-19 Economic Recovery Dashboard, by adopting agile practices to adapt to evolving requirements.

Projects

Smart Gas Network for Pre-Emptive Leak Detection

Sep 2016 – Present

Associated with New York University

Show project

This project assesses the technical and economic feasibility of the adaptation of artificial intelligence based Command and Control System of Systems (C2SOS) for early leak detection in the gas distribution systems for Consolidated Edison, based on the adaptation of the INCOM System developed by CALM Water and the French Commission of Atomic Energy.

Doha New Port Project: NPP-0050: Power Management System

Jun 2015 – Jul 2016

Associated with Larsen and Toubro power transmission and distribution

In this Project I worked on design of PMS for the Doha Port that controlled the overall power flow from the receiving substation to the distribution substation at each of the bays in the port.
